test_cases.title: Packaged app discovers bundled pi binary
test_cases.description: Verify findPiExecutable() returns bundled binary path when XYZ_AGENT_PACKAGED=1
steps: Ensure pi binary exists at cwd/pi/pi-{platform}-{arch}
Verify findPiExecutable() returns the bundled path
Remove binary and verify error is thrown

test_cases.title: Dev mode discovers pi via PATH/nvm
test_cases.description: Verify findPiExecutable() falls back to PATH/nvm search when XYZ_AGENT_PACKAGED is not set
steps: Verify findPiExecutable() searches PATH, nvm, common locations
Verify fallback to 'pi' when not found

test_cases.title: PI_CODING_AGENT_DIR injected in packaged mode
test_cases.description: Verify RpcClient sets PI_CODING_AGENT_DIR env var when spawning pi in packaged mode
steps: Verify pi process received PI_CODING_AGENT_DIR pointing to bundled agent dir

test_cases.title: PI_CODING_AGENT_DIR not set in dev mode
test_cases.description: Verify PI_CODING_AGENT_DIR is not injected in dev mode
steps: Verify pi process did NOT receive PI_CODING_AGENT_DIR

test_cases.title: Extensions load from bundled directory
test_cases.description: Verify subagent, goal, todo extensions load from PI_CODING_AGENT_DIR/extensions/
steps: Launch packaged app with PI_CODING_AGENT_DIR set

test_cases.title: All 19 xyz-harness skills load from bundled directory
test_cases.description: Verify all skills from xyz-harness submodule are discoverable by pi
steps: Launch packaged app with PI_CODING_AGENT_DIR set
Check pi log output for skill loading messages
Verify all 19 skill directories are present in PI_CODING_AGENT_DIR/skills/

test_cases.title: CI macOS build includes pi binary
test_cases.description: Verify macOS DMG contains pi-darwin-arm64 binary in Resources/pi/
steps: Verify pi binary exists in Resources/pi/ directory

test_cases.title: CI Windows build includes pi binary
test_cases.description: Verify Windows installer contains pi-windows-x64.exe in Resources/pi/
steps: Verify pi-windows-x64.exe exists in Resources/pi/ directory

test_cases.title: CI Linux build includes pi binary
test_cases.description: Verify Linux AppImage contains pi-linux-x64 binary in Resources/pi/
steps: Verify pi binary exists in Resources/pi/ directory

test_cases.title: Dev mode sends message successfully
test_cases.description: Verify npm run dev works without resources/pi/ directory
steps: Verify AI response received (using system pi)

test_cases.title: Packaged app ignores system pi
test_cases.description: Verify packaged app uses bundled pi even when system pi is installed
steps: Check logs for 'using bundled pi' message
Verify no reference to system pi path

test_cases.title: Provider config from Settings UI reaches pi
test_cases.description: Verify API key and base URL configured in Settings are passed to pi via env vars
steps: Configure provider in Settings UI (API key + base URL)
Verify API call uses configured provider
Check logs for correct PROVIDER_API_KEY and PROVIDER_BASE_URL env vars

test_cases.title: config-store skips ~/.pi/models.json in packaged mode
test_cases.description: Verify readPiDefaultModel() returns null when XYZ_AGENT_PACKAGED=1
steps: Verify getDefaultModel() falls back to config defaults
